objective: Add the first schema-backed handoff package layer so structured plans, execution scopes, validation artifacts, review/gate evidence, and closeouts can stay linked across model/agent handoffs.
scope_boundary: Add package handoff schema, execution-scope schema, example handoff artifact, validator/tests, and documentation.
Update structured-plan schema with optional handoff refs without breaking historical plans.
out_of_scope: GitHub CI hardening for handoff packages; tracked by issue #435.
SoM packet emitter/schema reconciliation; tracked by issue #437.
PR template and closeout hook hardening; tracked by issue #436.
research_summary: Read-only research agents and web research found that the repo already has structured plans, scopes, packets, validation artifacts, cross-review, Local CI, and closeouts, but lacks a thin connective handoff package binding those artifacts and handoff-specific ACs.

sprints.name: Schema and handoff package bootstrap
sprints.goal: Create a schema-backed package handoff artifact and validate the initial handoff chain for issue #438.
tasks: Add package handoff and execution-scope schemas.
Add example and active issue #438 handoff artifacts.
Add validator and tests for required refs, issue consistency, lifecycle rules, and AC refs.
Update schema docs, STANDARDS.md, backlog, and progress mirrors.
acceptance_criteria: Package handoff schema links issue, roles, lifecycle, plan, scope, packet, package manifest, ACs, validation, review/gate, artifacts, audit, and closeout refs.
Execution-scope schema mirrors the current assert_execution_scope.py contract.
Structured-plan schema can carry handoff package refs without breaking historical plans.
Validator tests prove valid handoffs pass and missing scope, issue mismatch, lane-claim mismatch, and accepted-without-closeout fail.

specialist_reviews.focus: Existing structured plan, scope, packet, cross-review, closeout, and gate surfaces.
specialist_reviews.summary: Confirmed current AC placement and enforcement surfaces; identified execution-scope AC, closeout completeness, packet null scope, and schema-validator gaps.

specialist_reviews.focus: Handoff package creation, schema drift, packet/dispatch drift, PR/closeout evidence gaps.
specialist_reviews.summary: Recommended package-handoff and execution-scope schemas plus follow-on validator/CI, packet, and closeout hardening.

specialist_reviews.focus: Structured handoff lifecycle and target-state model.
specialist_reviews.summary: Recommended a manifest-linked lifecycle that binds issue, plan, scope, packet, package manifest, validation, audit, and closeout.

alternate_model_review.summary: Standards/schema scope requires cross-review before merge. Review artifact records schema bootstrap approval and follow-up boundaries.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Implement governance-only schema, validator, tests, docs, plan/scope/handoff evidence, validation, and closeout for issue #438.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run focused validation, cross-review, Local CI Gate, closeout, PR, and automerge if green.
handoff_acceptance_criteria: Validator proves valid handoff package passes.
Validator proves missing/mismatched handoff refs fail.
Local CI Gate passes before PR merge.

material_deviation_rules: If CI wiring is needed beyond local validation, stop and use issue #435.
If packet emitter/schema changes are needed, stop and use issue #437.
If closeout hook hardening is needed, stop and use issue #436.
If downstream repos need propagation, create downstream issues instead of editing them here.
approved_by: operator approval: pdcar this, create GH epic/child issues, clear detailed ACs, and implement
